calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2004 Text Ruling

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Stephen Paffrath, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dimerco Express (USA) Corp., an Illinois Corp.
Plaintiff's witness: Kenneth Leung, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: VEO, Inc., a California Corp. as follows:
Principal $257,773.16
Interest $9,675.17
Costs $432.00
Judgment signed in open court.
